title: CNP Nashik Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 534 Supervisor, Junior Technician Posts
description: The Currency Note Press, Nashik (CNP Nashik) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 534 Welfare Officer, Safety Officer, Supervisor, Secretarial Assistant, Junior Office Assistant, Junior Technician Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, and Civil Engineering can apply ...
